name: 2-Port 25W Wall Charger - heyday™ with Vivien Rodriguez
description:
Power up your devices effortlessly with the 2-Port 25W Wall Charger from heyday™, designed in collaboration with Vivien Rodriguez. This lightweight charger features both USB and USB-C connections, allowing you to charge multiple devices simultaneously. Equipped with short circuit and surge protection, it ensures a safe charging experience every time. The convenient charge indicator light lets you know when your devices are powered up and ready to go. With quick charge capabilities, you'll spend less time tethered to an outlet and more time on the move.

About the artist: Vivien Rodriguez is a Mexican-American artist born and raised in Los Angeles, California. She derives a lot of her inspiration from her world travels, fascination with the natural world, and Mexican roots. Using strong psychedelic linework inspired by patterns in nature, Vivien hopes to take viewers through a visual journey depicting the strong connection between humans and nature.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
